description_long: This is a well-worn, brown stuffed bear toy with a patchwork design, featuring visible stitches and fabric patches that give it a vintage, loved appearance. The bear has a large, lighter tan patch on its belly, outlined with stitched details, and a smaller patch on its back. One of its eyes is represented by a black button, while the other is a stitched patch, adding to its character. The surface is marked with scuffs and faded spots, suggesting it has been played with extensively. Its limbs are rounded and slightly stubby, and the ears are small and upright. The overall look is soft, plush, and inviting, with a handmade, slightly rugged charm.
description: A brown, patchwork stuffed bear toy with stitched details, button eye, and visible fabric wear, giving it a vintage, well-loved look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear's tan belly patch, button eye, stitched patch eye, and visible chest and arm stitching.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bear's rounded snout, protruding nose, and the side seam stitching on the belly patch.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a small square patch on the back and the overall worn texture of the fabric.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the bear's profile, with the stitched patch eye and the side seam of the belly patch visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with a simple stitched mouth and asymmetrical eyes—one a black button, the other a stitched patch—giving it a slightly quirky, endearing look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs extended forward, head facing straight ahead.
